---
title: "about"
---

here you see interesting facts about Penguins.


```{r}
#| lable: penguins-glimpse
library(palmerpenguins)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| lable: fig-penguins
head(penguins)
scatter_penguins_plot <- ggplot(penguins, aes(
  x = bill_length_mm,
  y = bill_depth_mm,
  color = species
)) + geom_point() + labs(
  title = "comparing penguin species by bill size",
  x = "bill length in mm",
  y = "bill depth in mm"
)
scatter_penguins_plot
```
